name: SCC_CreateCM_Atten_Char_Ind
title: SCC_CreateCM_Atten_Char_Ind
syntax: void SCC_CreateCM_Atten_Char_Ind ( byte RunId[], byte SourceMac[], byte TargetMac[], byte SourceAddress[], dword NumSounds, dword NumGroups, byte AAG[] )
description: Creates a CM_Atten_Char.Ind message for sending.

parameters.name: RunId
parameters.description: Random Run Identifier of sender (8 byte).

parameters.name: SourceMac
parameters.description: Source address of the Ethernet frame.

parameters.name: TargetMac
parameters.description: Destination address of the Ethernet frame.

parameters.name: SourceAddress
parameters.description: MAC Address of the PEV which initiates the SLAC process.

parameters.name: NumSounds
parameters.description: Number of M-Sounds used to generate the ATTEN_PROFILE.

parameters.name: AAG
parameters.description: Average Attenuation Group (array length is indicated by the parameter NumGroups).
SecurityType dword 0x00 = No Security 0x01 = Public Key Signature 0x02-0xFF = Reserved

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
